title: How to show subitem into the side panel (conversation panel)
excerpt: How can I show sub items into the side panel or conversation panel? Is there an integration or app? or any trick?

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I show sub items into the side panel or conversation panel? Is there an integration or app? or any trick?

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: You could have a Formula column with {Subitems}, that will have the names of the subitems.

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Marius.Manic, I tried it but only columns you can see is names and count. This platform has all the features in the world but not a single one actually works. So frustrating.

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: It works - fabulously there is no perfect app on in the world, each one aims to do the best in some areas. IMHO, 180k+ clients can’t be wrong all together… so, choose your tool and run with it

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: wish I could say that and had the option to choose the tool. You’re right there is no perfect app in the world, since now I have to work in here, I’ll make the most of it. Thank you for your help.

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you mean the Updates window that pops up on the right when you click the chat/update bubble next to an item? If so, you can just add an Item Card as a new view and then add Subitems as a widget. Though, unfortunately it doesn’t look like it supports the File column as this time.

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @TaylorTedesco that’s exactly what I ended up doing, but it’s not a good user experience.
